message:
chore: add .tmp-go/ and cli_coverage.txt to .gitignore

- .tmp-go/: temporary Go build cache directory used when /tmp is full
  or during parallel agent builds
- cli_coverage.txt: CLI coverage report generated during test runs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -47,6 +47,12 @@ internal/cli/outputs/
 *.incomplete
 *.jsonl.lock
 
+# Go build temp directories
+.tmp-go/
+
+# Coverage reports
+cli_coverage.txt
+
 # Screenshots
 Snipping_*.png
